text:
The paper is real and found at arXiv:2402.03300. The cited author list includes "Xiao Bi" — the GitHub citation reference from the official DeepSeek-Math repo lists: Zhihong Shao, Peiyi Wang, Qihao Zhu, Runxin Xu, Junxiao Song, Mingchuan Zhang, Y.K. Li, Y. Wu, Daya Guo — no "Xiao Bi" or "Haowei Zhang". However, the cited reference uses "et al." and the first five authors (Zhihong Shao, Peiyi Wang, Qihao Zhu, Runxin Xu, Junxiao Song) substantially match the real author list. "Xiao Bi" appearing as Author 6 instead of "Mingchuan Zhang" is a mismatch, but the paper itself is clearly real and most of the leading authors match. This is a minor author list discrepancy in an "et al." citation context.

VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists at arXiv:2402.03300 with the exact title. The real author list (Zhihong Shao, Peiyi Wang, Qihao Zhu, Runxin Xu, Junxiao Song, Mingchuan Zhang, Y.K. Li, Y. Wu, Daya Guo) substantially overlaps with the cited authors; "Xiao Bi" and "Haowei Zhang" are not listed in the official citation but the first five authors and the arXiv ID both match, indicating a minor author-list error rather than fabrication.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2402.03300
